stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Thunder steal Game 3 on the...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next for the series.

stories.title: Thunder bench overwhelms Spurs in Game 3 win
stories.summary: Down 15-0 to the San Antonio Spurs, not even three minutes into Game 3 of the Western Conference finals Friday night, Oklahoma City Thunder coach Mark Daigneault quickly went to his bench.

stories.title: RCR retiring Busch's 8 car until son can take over...
stories.summary: Richard Childress Racing is temporarily retiring Kyle Busch's No. 8 Cup Series car until the late driver's 11-year-old son Brexton is ready to take over behind the wheel.

stories.title: NASCAR's O'Donnell: Busch 'an American badass'
stories.summary: NASCAR CEO Steve O'Donnell talked at length about Kyle Busch's legacy, his rebelliousness and even his feuds with the organization Friday.

stories.title: Florida signs 'Teddy Bridgewater Act' into law
stories.summary: Florida signed the "Teddy Bridgewater Act" into law on Friday, meaning high school coaches in the state will now be able to use their own money to help their players with expenses such as food, transportation, physical therapy and rehabilitation services.
